title: Wandering Rana
description: Readds the Rana mob from classic minecraft, in form of a wandering trader that sells various frog related items, such as her boots and hat
body:
Wandering Rana adds the classic [Rana](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mob_(entity)#Rana) mob from classic minecraft, but updated to the modern style, and in the form of a wandering trader!

Currently the only way to get her is through summoning in creative, but the next update will make her spawn rarely in the world through similar logic to the wandering trader.

When spawned, she has three variants corresponding to the vanilla frog variants: temperate, warm, and cold which spawn in certain biomes based on the frog type. Rana sells three items:
- Froglights based on her variant
- Her Frog Hats and Boots
